login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Enter your details below to login to your account.

marketing.subtitle: The maintenance platform for maritime fleet managers — immutable history, smart planning, Mistral AI.
marketing.testimonial: Since FleetAi, I know what needs to be done before things go wrong.

login.subtitleNew: Reconnect to your fleet — dashboard, planning, history.

signup.title: Signup
signup.subtitle: Enter your details below to create your account.

marketing.description: 14-day free trial · no credit card. Import your data from Excel in a few clicks.
marketing.subtitle: Import your boats, connect your history, and FleetAi tells you when to intervene.

signup.section01Sub: The owner account of the organization
signup.section02Sub: You can rename and invite members later
signup.orgNameHint: Visible to your teams and renters
signup.emailHint: We send a confirmation link to this address.
signup.termsHosting: My data is hosted in the EU (OVHcloud Strasbourg).
signup.fromSimulatorNotice: ✓ Your boat will be automatically added to your account upon registration.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.subtitleNew: It happens to the best skippers. Enter the email linked to your FleetAi account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailHint: The link is valid for 60 minutes.
forgotPassword.successContent: If a FleetAi account is linked to this address, you'll receive a link within a minute. Check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.spamWarning: Check your spam folder if you don't receive anything within 5 minutes — otherwise, contact support.

marketing.subtitle: We send you a password reset link by email.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.

marketing.subtitle: A strong password is your first line of defense.

aiCard.content: has exceeded 250 engine hours. The oil change takes ≈ 90 min. I can schedule it tomorrow morning during the weather window.

marketing.security: Hosted in EU · TLS 1.3 · GDPR · SOC 2 in progress
marketing.testimonialQuote: "We managed 14 boats in a spreadsheet. Today we manage 22 without hiring."
